title: Administer Tactic Types and Delivery Methods

story.so_that: manage which tactic types and delivery methods are available for requestors to select in order forms
story.i_want: add, remove, turn on or turn off tactic types and their linked delivery methods (mail, mobile app, in-story kiosk)

journey.before: Administrator needs to configure the system to control which tactic types and delivery methods are available to requestors
journey.during: Administrator navigates to the Tactic Type & Delivery Method section, reviews current settings, makes changes in draft mode, and saves when ready
journey.after: Changes take effect immediately, affecting what requestors can select in order forms while preserving historical data

capability_breakdown.core_action: Manage tactic types and their associated delivery methods through an admin interface
outputs: List of tactic types with linked delivery methods

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Administrator can view tactic types and delivery methods in list format
acceptance_criteria.gherkin:
Given I am an Administrator
When I navigate to the Tactic Type & Delivery Method section
Then I see a list of tactic types with their linked delivery methods
acceptance_criteria.jtbd: View available tactic types and delivery methods

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Active or inactive status is visible for each tactic type and delivery method
acceptance_criteria.gherkin:
When I view the tactic types list
Then each tactic type and delivery method shows its active/inactive status
acceptance_criteria.jtbd: Identify which tactic types and delivery methods are currently active

acceptance_criteria.gherkin:
When I click on a tactic type or delivery method
Then I can toggle its active/inactive status
acceptance_criteria.jtbd: Toggle active/inactive status for tactic types and delivery methods

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Administrator can add new tactic types and delivery methods
acceptance_criteria.gherkin:
When I click add new tactic type or delivery method
Then I can enter the required information and save it
acceptance_criteria.jtbd: Create new tactic types and delivery methods

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Active tactic types and methods are visible to requestors in order forms
acceptance_criteria.gherkin:
Given a tactic type and delivery method is marked active
When a requestor views the order form
Then they can select that tactic type and delivery method
acceptance_criteria.jtbd: Make tactic types and delivery methods available to requestors

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Inactive tactic types and methods are not visible to any users
acceptance_criteria.gherkin:
Given a tactic type and delivery method is marked inactive
When a requestor or any user views the order form
Then they cannot select that tactic type and delivery method
acceptance_criteria.jtbd: Hide tactic types and delivery methods from requestors

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Inactive tactic types and methods remain in historical records
acceptance_criteria.gherkin:
Given a tactic type and delivery method is marked inactive
When viewing historical requests that used that tactic/method
Then the historical record still shows the tactic type and delivery method
acceptance_criteria.jtbd: Preserve historical data when deactivating tactic types and delivery methods

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Delivery methods are unique by Name and ParentType combination
acceptance_criteria.gherkin:
When creating a delivery method
Then the combination of Name and ParentType must be unique

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Tactic types and delivery methods cannot be deleted, only marked inactive
acceptance_criteria.gherkin:
When managing tactic types or delivery methods
Then deletion is not permitted, only marking as inactive
acceptance_criteria.jtbd: Prevent accidental data loss by disallowing deletion

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Only tactic types with at least one delivery method are displayed
acceptance_criteria.gherkin:
When displaying tactic types in the admin interface
Then only show tactic types that have at least one associated delivery method
acceptance_criteria.jtbd: Filter tactic types to show only those with delivery methods

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Changes are held in draft mode until explicitly saved
acceptance_criteria.gherkin:
When making changes to tactic types or delivery methods
Then changes are held in draft mode until explicitly saved
And users can review all changes before committing
acceptance_criteria.jtbd: Review and confirm changes before saving

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Delivery methods can specify print support requirement
acceptance_criteria.gherkin:
When creating or editing a delivery method
Then I can specify whether it requires print support
acceptance_criteria.jtbd: Specify print support requirement for delivery methods

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Delivery methods have active or inactive status
acceptance_criteria.gherkin:
When managing delivery methods
Then each method has an active or inactive status
acceptance_criteria.jtbd: Track active/inactive status for delivery methods
